description:
All three adapters (Ed25519Signer, EcdsaP256Signer, RsaPssSigner) are implicitly Send + Sync because Arc<dyn SigningBackend> is Send + Sync (SigningBackend: Send + Sync per secretx-core). No doc comment states this.

Callers who use these adapters in tokio::spawn, across thread boundaries, or in async contexts rely on Send + Sync as a postcondition. If SigningBackend's supertrait bounds ever change to remove Send or Sync, the adapters lose those impls silently and callers get compile errors with no warning in the changelog.

The crate should either:
(a) Add an explicit 'static_assertions::assert_impl_all!(Ed25519Signer: Send, Sync)' test, or
(b) Add a doc note ('This type is Send + Sync.') to each adapter struct, or
(c) Add explicit 'impl Send for Ed25519Signer {}' etc. with a safety comment, to make the guarantee visible and auditable.

This affects all three adapter structs (lines 102, 161, 224).
title: Send+Sync auto-impl on adapter types not documented as a postcondition
